_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: RuneScape: Dragonwilds
author: dannyhuggins@proton.me
description: RuneScape: Dragonwilds Dedicated Server. Fight, farm, build and survive in the world of Gielinor. Powered by SteamCMD.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
## install RuneScape Dragonwilds Dedicated Server
## Server Files: /mnt/server

if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
    echo -e "steam user is not set.\n"
    echo -e "Using anonymous user.\n"
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
else
    echo -e "user set to ${STEAM_USER}"
fi

## download and install steamcmd
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p steamapps

chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## install game using steamcmd
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAID} ]] || printf %s "-beta ${SRCDS_BETAID}" ) $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAPASS} ]] || printf %s "-betapassword ${SRCDS_BETAPASS}" ) validate +quit

## set up 32 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so 2>/dev/null || true

## set up 64 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so 2>/dev/null || true

## make server binary executable
chmod +x /mnt/server/RSDragonwildsServer.sh 2>/dev/null || true

echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: App ID
variables.description: Steam App ID for RuneScape: Dragonwilds Dedicated Server. Do not edit.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Automatically update the server via SteamCMD on every start.

variables.name: Beta Branch Password
variables.description: Password for the beta branch if required.

variables.name: Owner ID
variables.description: Your RuneScape: Dragonwilds Player ID. Found in-game at the bottom of the Settings menu. The server WILL NOT START without this value.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: The display name of your server.

variables.name: Default World Name
variables.description: Name for the default world created on server startup. Case sensitive for players searching for your server.

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description: Password for server admin access. Anyone who knows this can access the Server Management tab in-game.

variables.name: World Password
variables.description: Optional password players must enter to join the server. Leave empty for open access.
